title: portulaca johnstonii
intro: Portulaca johnstonii, also known as the Hawaiian purslane, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Portulacaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high levels of vitamin C and other nutrients. The health benefits of Portulaca johnstonii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat various ailments.
